[SmartIntern AI] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-22T15:14:35.550+01:00 INFO 46116 --- [SmartIntern AI] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists competences cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists encadrants_academiques cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists encadrants_entreprises cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists entreprises cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists etudiants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists filieres cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists offre_competence cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists offres cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table competences ( id bigint generated by default as identity, categorie varchar(255), nom varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table encadrants_academiques ( id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null unique, departement varchar(255), nom varchar(255), prenom varchar(255), specialite varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table encadrants_entreprises ( entreprise_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null unique, nom varchar(255), poste varchar(255), prenom varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table entreprises ( id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null unique, adresse varchar(255), description TEXT, nom varchar(255), secteur varchar(255), telephone varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table etudiants ( filiere_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null unique, bio TEXT, cv_path varchar(255), niveau_academique varchar(255), nom varchar(255), prenom varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table filieres ( id bigint generated by default as identity, nom varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table offre_competence ( competence_id bigint not null, offre_id bigint not null, primary key (competence_id, offre_id) ) Hibernate: create table offres ( active boolean not null, remuneration numeric(38,2), date_publication timestamp(6) not null, entreprise_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, description TEXT not null, domaine varchar(255) not null, duree varchar(255) not null, lieu varchar(255) not null, niveau_requis varchar(255) not null, titre varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( actif boolean not null, date_creation timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, reset_token_expiry timestamp(6), email varchar(255) not null unique, mot_de_passe varchar(255) not null, reset_token varchar(255), role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('ADMIN','ETUDIANT','ENTREPRISE','ENCADRANT_ACADEMIQUE','ENCADRANT_ENTREPRISE')), statut_compte varchar(255) not null check (statut_compte in ('EN_ATTENTE','APPROUVE','REFUSE','SUSPENDU')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists encadrants_academiques add constraint FKbmihq8r22k3wq04ai91mvqm8t foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists encadrants_entreprises add constraint FKgy63bi1k2q132ijrjj00ye3b9 foreign key (entreprise_id) references entreprises Hibernate: alter table if exists encadrants_entreprises add constraint FKggiqtcrbub0f241lkw1pe5n0t foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists entreprises add constraint FKq59hb5mo5roq2st6dyxxjjo5i foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists etudiants add constraint FK7eq6v2ircv32llkvdvg6wsom6 foreign key (filiere_id) references filieres Hibernate: alter table if exists etudiants add constraint FKsgxlwybt9svpg1vi17i44695h foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists offre_competence add constraint FKjnomtvct14nix391a8gi3oow7 foreign key (competence_id) references competences Hibernate: alter table if exists offre_competence add constraint FKekokvyn03otfmfod6ha45iy26 foreign key (offre_id) references offres Hibernate: alter table if exists offres add constraint FK9hf923m48chb4p9vy0x38f7xo foreign key (entreprise_id) references entreprises 2026-03-22T15:14:35.628+01:00 INFO 46116 --- [SmartIntern AI] [ main]
